hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */backend/*.py) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && uv run ruff format "$f") ;; */frontend/*.ts|*/frontend/*.tsx|*/frontend/*.js|*/frontend/*.jsx) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend" && pnpm exec oxfmt "$f") ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
